quoteFirst: Seeing that he and Kauper had been over this stage of the course only a week before, he hoped they would reach Ramsgate in slightly better time, but the fog was against them, and it was not until
quoteLast: that they alighted at Ramsgate, having taken 159 minutes from Southampton, or 15 minutes longer than when they made their first attempt.
title: H. G. Hawker, airman: his life and work
author: Hawker, Muriel; Moore-Brabazon, John Theodore Cuthbert, 1884-1964 [Author of introduction, etc.]
